mapper.select: SELECT id, username, display_name AS displayName, password_hash AS passwordHash, coins, recycle_crystal AS recycleCrystal, welcome_home_bonus_granted AS welcomeHomeBonusGranted, last_mission_date AS lastMissionDate, created_at AS createdAt, last_access_at AS lastAccessAt, cpu_think_speed AS cpuThinkSpeed, time_pack_cycle_start AS timePackCycleStart, time_pack_bonus_bank AS timePackBonusBank, starter_gift_standard1_remaining AS starterGiftStandard1Remaining, selected_epithet_upper_id AS selectedEpithetUpperId, selected_epithet_lower_id AS selectedEpithetLowerId, pvp_invite_notify_enabled AS pvpInviteNotifyEnabled FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, username, display_name AS displayName, password_hash AS passwordHash, coins, recycle_crystal AS recycleCrystal, welcome_home_bonus_granted AS welcomeHomeBonusGranted, last_mission_date AS lastMissionDate, created_at AS createdAt, last_access_at AS lastAccessAt, cpu_think_speed AS cpuThinkSpeed, time_pack_cycle_start AS timePackCycleStart, time_pack_bonus_bank AS timePackBonusBank, starter_gift_standard1_remaining AS starterGiftStandard1Remaining, selected_epithet_upper_id AS selectedEpithetUpperId, selected_epithet_lower_id AS selectedEpithetLowerId, pvp_invite_notify_enabled AS pvpInviteNotifyEnabled FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, display_name, password_hash, coins, last_mission_date, starter_gift_standard1_remaining, cpu_think_speed, selected_epithet_upper_id, selected_epithet_lower_id) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{coins}, #{lastMissionDate}, #{starterGiftStandard1Remaining}, COALESCE(#{cpuThinkSpeed}, 'NORMAL'), (SELECT id FROM nickname_epithet WHERE kind = 'UPPER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー中の' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM nickname_epithet WHERE kind = 'LOWER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー' LIMIT 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET coins = #{coins} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET coins = #{coins}, welcome_home_bonus_granted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET coins = COALESCE(coins, 0) + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET coins = coins + #{amount}, welcome_home_bonus_granted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND welcome_home_bonus_granted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET last_mission_date = #{lastMissionDate} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET last_access_at = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET time_pack_cycle_start = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET time_pack_bonus_bank = COALESCE(time_pack_bonus_bank, 0) + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET time_pack_bonus_bank = time_pack_bonus_bank - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND COALESCE(time_pack_bonus_bank, 0) > 0
UPDATE app_user SET starter_gift_standard1_remaining = starter_gift_standard1_remaining - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND starter_gift_standard1_remaining > 0
UPDATE app_user SET starter_gift_standard1_remaining = #{remaining} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE app_user SET display_name = #{displayName}, cpu_think_speed = #{cpuThinkSpeed}, selected_epithet_upper_id = #{upperId}, selected_epithet_lower_id = #{lowerId}, pvp_invite_notify_enabled = #{pvpInviteNotifyEnabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET recycle_crystal = COALESCE(recycle_crystal, 0) + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET recycle_crystal = #{crystal} WHERE id = #{id}
